title: Open Agentic CMO Audit Artifact
description: Canonical schema for Babe's structured research audit artifact.

type.description: Artifact type. Must always be audit.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp for when the audit artifact was produced.

sections.description: Structured audit sections produced by Babe.

summary.description: Clear, concise overview of the current research state.

interpretation.description: What the signal means for the workflow.

inconsistencies.description: Conflicting, surprising, or potentially risky signals.

why_it_matters.description: Why this inconsistency matters for strategy or content.

uncertainty.description: Data gaps, assumptions, or uncertainty that should be made explicit.

impact.description: How the gap affects strategy, content, or confidence.

opportunities.description: Actionable opportunities derived from the audit.

reasoning.description: Why this opportunity follows from the research.

recommended_content_angles.description: Concrete content directions for Porky to use during strategy synthesis. These are not final content drafts.

critical_flags.description: Machine-readable publishing, positioning, factual, or compliance risks that Porky must either block, exclude, or safely frame before strategy synthesis. Must be present even when empty.

flag.description: Short name for the critical flag.

affects_publishing.description: Whether this risk affects publishable strategy or content.

requires_human_confirmation.description: Whether this risk requires human confirmation before it can be used in strategy or content.

description.description: Clear explanation of the risk, uncertainty, or conflict.

unsafe_claims.description: Claims that should not be used downstream unless explicitly confirmed or safely reframed.

safe_framing.description: Safe alternative framing that Porky may convert into strategy constraints and Hamm may use in content.

sections.summary: Based on available data, Piggy Wallet is positioned as a fintech and edtech product for families in emerging markets.

key_signals.signal: Families in emerging markets face inflation pressure that can make saving feel unreliable.
key_signals.interpretation: Content should explain why saving behavior needs both education and protection.

inconsistencies.signal: Piggy Wallet uses Web3 infrastructure but aims for a Web2-like user experience.
inconsistencies.description: There is a potential messaging tension between the underlying technology and the desired simplicity for users.
inconsistencies.why_it_matters: Content should avoid making users feel they need to understand crypto in order to trust or use the product.

uncertainty.gap: Current live engagement data is not included in this artifact.
uncertainty.impact: Content angles should be treated as strategic hypotheses until validated with platform performance data.

opportunities.opportunity: Create educational content explaining why money habits matter early.
opportunities.reasoning: This aligns with Piggy Wallet’s edtech mission and gives parents a non-technical reason to care.

recommended_content_angles.angle: Saving is a habit, but protection is a system.
recommended_content_angles.reasoning: Connects financial education with inflation-aware product positioning.

critical_flags.description: Exact feature availability is not confirmed in this artifact, so downstream strategy and content should avoid specific feature claims unless separately validated.
unsafe_claims: Piggy Wallet already supports every savings feature mentioned in this campaign.
safe_framing: Piggy Wallet is designed to help families build better savings habits.
Piggy Wallet focuses on financial education and savings protection.
Piggy Wallet uses modern infrastructure under the hood while keeping the experience simple.

critical_flags.description: Piggy Wallet uses Web3 infrastructure, but the audience should not be required to understand crypto concepts to understand the product.
unsafe_claims: Families need to understand crypto to use Piggy Wallet.
Parents should manage wallets, chains, and keys themselves.
safe_framing: The product should be explained through simple family outcomes.
Web3 infrastructure should remain under the hood in general-audience content.

sections.summary: Based on available data, no critical publishing risks were identified for this narrow research scope.

key_signals.signal: Piggy Wallet’s mission centers on financial education for families.
key_signals.interpretation: Content can safely focus on education, habits, and trust.

uncertainty.gap: No live engagement data was included.
uncertainty.impact: Content angles should be validated through future performance data.

opportunities.opportunity: Create educational content around early money habits.
opportunities.reasoning: This aligns with Piggy Wallet’s mission and avoids unsupported technical claims.

recommended_content_angles.reasoning: This angle is educational, simple, and aligned with the parent audience.
